hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: Villa Park Zwierzyniec in Zwierzyniec offers a spacious apartment with a terrace and free WiFi. The property features family rooms, a lift, and free on-site private parking.
Modern Amenities: Guests enjoy air-conditioning, a kitchenette, private bathroom, tea and coffee maker, hairdryer, coffee machine, dining table, quiet street view, refrigerator, free toiletries, TV, parquet floors, dining area, electric kettle, kitchenware, wardrobe, stovetop, and sofa bed.
Local Attractions: Roztocze National Park is a 9-minute walk away. Other points of interest include ZamoГ…вЂєГ„вЂЎ Town Hall (31 km), ZamoГ…вЂєГ„вЂЎ Synagogue (32 km), ZamoГ…вЂєГ„вЂЎ Cathedral (31 km), ZamoГ…вЂєГ„вЂЎ Art Gallery (31 km), and Grand Market Square (32 km). Lublin Airport is 100 km from the property.

hotels.description_it:
